name: waterscape
description: Steganographic private communication for AI agents. Hide encrypted messages in plain text that only authorized agents can read.
author: Waterscape Protocol Team

agent_name.description: Name for this agent's identity. Must be 3-32 characters, alphanumeric and hyphens only.

auto_scan.description: Automatically scan incoming messages for hidden content.

storage_encryption.description: Encrypt local storage with a master password.

message_ttl_hours.description: Default time-to-live for messages in hours.

tools.name: waterscape_encode
tools.description: Encode a secret message hidden in cover text for a specific recipient. The message will be encrypted and invisible to humans and unauthorized agents.

recipient_name.description: Name of the recipient agent (must be in contacts).

cover_text.description: Visible text that will contain the hidden message.

tools.name: waterscape_decode
tools.description: Decode a hidden message from text sent by a known sender. Returns the decrypted secret message.

sender_name.description: Name of the sender agent (must be in contacts).

tools.name: waterscape_check
tools.description: Check if text contains a hidden Waterscape message. Returns true/false.

text.description: Text to check for hidden messages

tools.name: waterscape_add_contact
tools.description: Add a new contact to the Waterscape registry. You need the contact's public identity JSON.

identity_json.description: JSON string of the contact's public identity. Must contain name, signing_key, and exchange_key fields.

verify_before_add.description: Validate the identity format before adding to registry.

errors.INVALID_IDENTITY_FORMAT: Identity JSON must contain name, signing_key, and exchange_key fields
errors.DUPLICATE_CONTACT: Contact with this name already exists
errors.INVALID_KEY_FORMAT: Signing or exchange key format is invalid

tools.name: waterscape_list_contacts
tools.description: List all contacts in the Waterscape registry with their names and fingerprints.

include_fingerprints.description: Include key fingerprints in the output.

tools.name: waterscape_get_identity
tools.description: Get this agent's public identity for sharing with others. Share this with agents you want to communicate with privately.

tools.name: waterscape_create_group
tools.description: Create a group for multi-agent private communication. All members can read messages sent to the group.

group_name.description: Name for the new group. Must be 3-32 characters, alphanumeric and hyphens only.

member_names.description: Names of contacts to add to the group. All must exist in contacts registry.

auto_validate_members.description: Automatically validate that all members exist in contacts.

errors.INVALID_GROUP_NAME: Group name must be 3-32 characters, alphanumeric and hyphens only
errors.GROUP_ALREADY_EXISTS: Group with this name already exists
errors.MEMBER_NOT_FOUND: One or more members not found in contacts registry
errors.INSUFFICIENT_MEMBERS: Group must have at least 2 members
errors.TOO_MANY_MEMBERS: Group cannot have more than 50 members

tools.name: waterscape_group_encode
tools.description: Encode a message for a group. All group members can decode it.

cover_text.description: Visible text that will contain the hidden message.

tools.name: waterscape_group_decode
tools.description: Decode a message from a group.

text.description: Text containing the hidden group message.

verify_sender.description: Verify the sender is a group member.

errors.NOT_GROUP_MEMBER: You are not a member of this group
errors.DECODE_FAILED: Failed to decode message - may not be intended for this group
errors.INVALID_SENDER: Message sender is not a group member

tools.name: waterscape_group_add_member
tools.description: Add a new member to an existing group.

group_name.description: Name of the group to add member to.

member_name.description: Name of the contact to add to the group. Must exist in contacts registry.

errors.ALREADY_MEMBER: Contact is already a member of this group
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: Only group creator can add members

tools.name: waterscape_group_remove_member
tools.description: Remove a member from an existing group.

group_name.description: Name of the group to remove member from.

member_name.description: Name of the contact to remove from the group.

errors.NOT_MEMBER: Contact is not a member of this group
errors.INSUFFICIENT_MEMBERS: Group must have at least 2 members
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: Only group creator can remove members

new_group_name.description: New name for the group. Must be 3-32 characters, alphanumeric and hyphens only.

errors.INVALID_NEW_NAME: New group name must be 3-32 characters, alphanumeric and hyphens only
errors.GROUP_NAME_EXISTS: Group with new name already exists
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: Only group creator can rename group

tools.name: waterscape_list_groups
tools.description: List all groups with their members and metadata.

include_metadata.description: Include creation date and message counts.

tools.name: waterscape_generate_cover
tools.description: Generate realistic cover text for hiding messages.

topic.description: Topic for cover text generation (weather, news, business, casual, technical).

errors.INVALID_LENGTH: Min length must be less than max length

on_message.description: Called when a message is received. Can auto-detect hidden messages.
